_purpose: Central tracking configuration for LavaggioMaterassi. Keep IDs here so pages do not need to be edited one by one.
_status: Tracking scaffold ready. External analytics and ads tags disabled until new LavaggioMaterassi IDs are inserted.
notesForPier: Use a dedicated GA4 property for lavaggiomaterassi.com unless intentionally tracking multiple related domains in the same property.
Consent Mode remains denied by default for analytics and ads until the user accepts or updates cookie preferences.
Google Ads, Meta Pixel, GA4 and Google Tag Manager are disabled for now.
When IDs change, edit only this file and keep every HTML page untouched.
Use DNS verification for Google Search Console where possible, not an HTML tag.
